title: Olympic champion gifts Trump a gold medal
shortDescription: Two-time Olympic gold medalist Jordan Stolz gave President Donald Trump one of his gold medals at an event for Wisconsin farmers.

title: Trump on ticket prices: 'That's the way life is'
shortDescription: President Trump, who said he plans to attend Game 3, was asked about high ticket prices for the NBA Finals, saying "that's the way life is, you know?"

title: President Trump considers government owning stake in AI companies
shortDescription: President Trump said he's exploring the federal government acquiring shares in AI companies, likening it to a "partnership with the American people."

title: Trump says he supports salary cap for Major League Baseball
shortDescription: President Trump said MLB needs a salary cap, siding with the owners as the league works on a new CBA to avoid a lockout after the season.

title: Maine oysterfarmer Graham Platner through his campaign for U.S. Senate
shortDescription: Oysterfarmer and Democrat Graham Platner hopes to defeat Republican Sen. Susan Collins in Maine's U.S. Senate race.

title: What the latest poll says about Washington DC mayoral election
shortDescription: Janeese Lewis George still leads Kenyan McDuffie in the latest Washington DC mayoral poll, but by how much? And will ranked choice voting matter?

title: Murder charge dismissed for Arkansas GOP sheriff nominee
shortDescription: A murder case against an Arkansas GOP sheriff nominee has been dismissed after officials lost evidence.

title: Whistleblower: DOGE pushed Social Security to assign fake death dates
shortDescription: Trump officials planned to mark 2.7 million living people as dead, whistleblower claims.

title: Watch Trump news and his weekend schedule from Trump Connect reporter
shortDescription: President Donald Trump could build "Trump Promenade" in DC. He is headed to Wisconsin today and to the NBA Finals game on Monday. Watch the rundown.

title: What is Donald Trump's approval rating? Voters weigh in on gas prices
shortDescription: President Donald Trump's endorsements have carried heavy weight in the midterm primaries, even as he has a low approval rating. What is it?

title: Trump on Mamdani: 'I would be better than him'
shortDescription: Trump slammed Mamdani and his plans once again this week. Here's what to know.

title: Trump taunts critics as reflecting pool fills
shortDescription: President Donald Trump posted an AI-generated video that shows him filling the Lincoln Memorial Reflecting Pool from a hose attached to a crying person.

title: Trump reveals new rally lineup after Freedom 250 concerts canceled
shortDescription: Trump has revealed the new lineup for a rally celebrating the nation's 250th anniversary after a slew of musicians pulled out of a Freedom 250 event.

title: $70B for ICE or 7M new homes? Democrats sharpen midterm case vs. GOP
shortDescription: In a marathon voting session, Senate Democrats forced Republicans to bat down a litany of measures, including housing affordability plans.

title: Senate passes ICE funding bill
shortDescription: Senate passes ICE funding bill 52-47, sending measure boosting DHS immigration enforcement to the House for final approval.

title: Latest on California election: Hilton presses Newsom to speed count
shortDescription: California election officials are calling on the public to "be patient" as primary ballots get counted.

title: Senate backs $70 billion in new funds for ICE, Border Patrol
shortDescription: The Senate voted 52-47 to approve the legislation, with no support from Democrats and no provision to ban a $1.8 billion "anti-weaponization" fund.

title: DOJ says $1.8B Trump fund is dead, but legal battles continue
shortDescription: The DOJ told a federal court it won't move forward with President Donald Trump's so-called 'anti-weaponization fund,' as legal battles rage on.

title: In latest blow to Trump on foreign policy, House passes Ukraine aid
shortDescription: Eighteen Republicans sided with Democrats to authorize billions in aid to Ukraine.

title: Trump says 'something happened' to Joe Biden during fateful debate
shortDescription: President Donald Trump commented on former President Joe Biden's mental acuity at a June 4 Oval Office event.

title: Kennedy Center staff told to remove Trump's name by June 12
shortDescription: Kennedy Center employees have been instructed to remove Donald Trump's name from signs and materials by June 12 to comply with a judge's order.

title: Two Dan Sullivans on Alaska ballot spark GOP concerns
shortDescription: Incumbent Alaska Sen. Dan Sullivan alleges voter confusion after another candidate with the same name joins the race, prompting GOP legal threats.

title: Trump unveils 'Trump Promenade' plan
shortDescription: President Trump unveiled a "Trump Promenade" plan behind the Lincoln Memorial to improve pedestrian access to the Potomac River.

title: Trump won't nominate Pulte for permanent DNI amid pushback
shortDescription: Pulte, 38, has generated bipartisan pushback, with senators questioning his qualifications to serve as director of national intelligence.

title: 'Trump Promenade': President touts addition to Lincoln Memorial
shortDescription: President Donald Trump plans to build a promenade at the Lincoln Memorial. An administration official said the concept is part of the original design of the National Mall.

title: Pew: Trump admin's X engagement surpasses Biden's. What does it mean?
shortDescription: Federal government's social media posts on X, formerly Twitter, are drawing far more engagement under Trump than Biden, new Pew data shows.
